channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. Backdoor Found in the Firmware for These Wi-Fi Routers. And There's No Patch  PCMag
  2. CERT/CC Warns of Hidden Admin Backdoor in Tenda Router Firmware  The Hacker News
  3. Tenda routers have unpatched backdoor vulnerability, CERT/CC warns  SC Media
  4. Hidden backdoor in Tenda routers goes unpatched as company ignores warnings from cybersecurity researchers — Chinese company's firmware allows admin access without a password  Tom's Hardware
  5. Your Tenda router could have a hidden firmware backdoor - disable this setting ASAP  ZDNET

item.title: World-First 'Super Alloy' Could Transform The Way Metals Are Made - ScienceAlert
item.description: World-First 'Super Alloy' Could Transform The Way Metals Are Made  ScienceAlert

item.title: Nintendo confirms Switch 1 consoles will be withdrawn from Europe following EU law change on batteries - GamesIndustry.biz
item.description:
1. Nintendo confirms Switch 1 consoles will be withdrawn from Europe following EU law change on batteries  GamesIndustry.biz
  2. Information about upcoming battery-related revisions to some Nintendo products  nintendo.com
  3. Nintendo Confirms Switch 1 Global Availability After Announcing European Withdrawal  IGN
  4. The Nintendo Switch’s days are numbered—but what is that number?  Ars Technica
  5. Nintendo Prepares the Original Switch for the End  Gizmodo
